name: Top-k singular values via power iteration
task: Create /tmp/eval_svd/svd.py with top_singular_values(matrix, k) returning a list of the k largest singular values of `matrix` (descending). Use power iteration on A^T A with deflation: iterate v ← (A^T A) v, normalize, orthogonalize against previously found right singular vectors. Square root the eigenvalue to recover σ.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_svd/svd.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); T = mod.top_singular_values; s = T([[5,0],[0,3]], 2); assert abs(s[0] - 5) < 1e-6 and abs(s[1] - 3) < 1e-6; s2 = T([[3,0],[0,4],[0,0]], 2); assert abs(s2[0] - 4) < 1e-6 and abs(s2[1] - 3) < 1e-6; print('OK')
